data.body:
LIVE VALIDATION PERFORMED (2026-06-15, commit 17f2238a) against the real model claude-opus-4-8 with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY present and the [agents] extra installed. tests/external/test_llm_live.py now covers ALL THREE operations and all 3 pass live (review_ticket, review_code, scan_spec).

AC status:
- [x] ToolStrategy structured output populates structured_response with real tools attached — VALIDATED: all 3 ops return a schema-valid findings list, no StructuredOutputError.
- [x] No temperature sent to claude-opus-4.x (no 400) — VALIDATED: review_ticket asserts result.model==claude-opus-4-8 and the call completed (a temperature would 400).
- [ ] MCP tool session lifecycle — NOT exercised (no REBAR_LLM_MCP_SERVERS configured in this env).
- [ ] Langfuse trace + flush + prompt->trace linkage — NOT exercised (no LANGFUSE_* configured).

Crucially, the live run found and I FIXED three real runtime bugs that only surface end-to-end: (1) model-emitted nulls on optional string fields failed schema validation ('None is not of type string') -> normalize now strips nulls; (2) the read-only file tools raised uncaught on a missing path (file in diff not on disk) and a denied path (model called list_directory('/')), aborting the whole agent run -> tools now return a recoverable 'Error: ...' message (security unchanged, verified by subagent review); (3) the live review_code test was unrealistic (referenced a file never written to disk) -> now writes it + uses the default iteration budget. Offline regression tests added for (1) and (2). Subagent security+completeness review: clean.

The 2 remaining AC items (MCP session lifecycle, Langfuse tracing) require live third-party services (an MCP server + a Langfuse instance) configured via REBAR_LLM_MCP_SERVERS / LANGFUSE_* — they remain runnable via the same external-integration suite once those are configured. The CORE live-model path (the heart of this ticket) is now proven.
